must_detect.matched_text:
Ms. Arisa Thawinrat (Assistant Finance Manager, DOB 1988-07-03, employee ID SNE-FIN-0724) used device Lenovo ThinkPad T14 asset SNE-T14-1149 at Chao Prasee Tower, Level 21, Krung Thep Nua; VPN Session ID 0xA9C4-TH-BKK-021; account arisa.t@sne.example.
The attacker obtained read-only access for 14 minutes to draft Q2 MD&A and a non-public term sheet for a THB 1.2 billion sustainability-linked loan with Riverjade Bank PCL, pricing grid THOR+145–175 bps tied to carbon intensity KPIs.
This information has not been disclosed via SETLink and may be material under the Securities and Exchange Act; a trading blackout is reaffirmed for insiders until disclosure.
No national IDs, passport scans, or payroll bank numbers were exfiltrated; PDPA data at risk comprised business contact details and workstation telemetry.
Cross-border processors include CloudKrai Pte. Ltd. (Singapore) and JitPalm (HK) Limited; transfers are governed by SCCs and PDPA Section 28–29 clauses in our DPA.
Employment context: two fixed-term contractors in the group Ops_Contractors had access to the FIN-FORECAST share via role-based rights; access has been suspended pending re-validation.
Separate weak identifiers observed that should not identify a person alone: a 29-year-old contractor at Hua Klang plant used Android 13 device ID A13-OPS-5560 from IP 10.44.5.22 at 03:14 ICT.
Another event with no link to a named individual: payroll grade B3 at Sam Rong depot, alias account ops726 attempted login (unsuccessful), MAC 7A:9C:11:22:33:44, session token ref 7f9e:th:ops.
Preliminary assessment indicates potential revenue timing shifts below 5% of FY26 guidance; no breach of Riverjade Bank Facility Agreement clause 5.2(b) notice thresholds.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
